issue_summary: Add Charset sister APIs to method that take a String charset name.
javadoc_before:
/** * Get the contents of a byte[] as a String * using the specified character encoding. *

* Character encoding names can be found at * IANA. * * @param input the byte array to read from * @param encoding the encoding to use, null means platform default * @return the requested String * @throws NullPointerException if the input is null * @throws IOException if an I/O error occurs (never occurs) * @deprecated Use {@link String#String(byte[],String)} */
javadoc_after:
/** * Get the contents of a byte[] as a String * using the specified character encoding. *

* Character encoding names can be found at * IANA. * * @param input the byte array to read from * @param encoding the encoding to use, null means platform default * @return the requested String * @throws NullPointerException if the input is null * @throws IOException if an I/O error occurs (never occurs) */
